_comment: Nexus-AI MCP Server — Claude Desktop Configuration
WHAT THIS FILE IS:
This file tells Claude Desktop how to connect to the Nexus-AI MCP server.
Copy the content of 'mcpServers' into your claude_desktop_config.json.
WHERE YOUR CLAUDE DESKTOP CONFIG LIVES:
Windows : %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json
Mac     : ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json
HOW TO CONNECT:
1. Start the Nexus-AI server first:
cd C:\Dan_WS\Nexus-AI && source venv/bin/activate
uvicorn api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
2. Open (or create) your claude_desktop_config.json
3. Merge the 'mcpServers' block below into it
4. Fully quit Claude Desktop (not just close the window) and relaunch
5. Look for the hammer icon in Claude Desktop — that means MCP tools are active
TROUBLESHOOTING:
- 'Connection failed'   → Is uvicorn running? curl http://localhost:8000/api/health
- 'No tools available'  → Did you fully restart Claude Desktop after editing config?
- 'Timeout on kpis'     → Normal on Gemini free tier (cold start). Try nexus_pipeline_summary instead.
- Config syntax error   → Validate with: python -m json.tool docs/mcp_config.json
THE 10 AVAILABLE TOOLS:
DATA / QUERY TOOLS (fast, DB-only, no LLM):
nexus_query_leads        — List CRM leads, filter by stage
nexus_query_deals        — List pipeline deals, filter by stage/owner
nexus_get_deal_history   — Full deal + lead record by deal_id
nexus_pipeline_summary   — Stage counts + total pipeline value (no LLM)
nexus_agent_runs         — Recent LangGraph agent run logs
KNOWLEDGE TOOL (RAG — calls Ollama embed + LLM):
nexus_search_knowledge   — Hybrid semantic+BM25 search over the knowledge base
ACTION TOOLS (write to DB or invoke LangGraph agents):
nexus_update_deal_stage  — Move a deal to a new pipeline stage
nexus_ingest_document    — Add a URL / file / text to the knowledge base
nexus_schedule_followup  — Generate a follow-up email draft via LangGraph agent
nexus_pipeline_kpis      — Full KPI report with LLM executive digest (5-15s)
_usage: Merge the 'mcpServers' object below into your claude_desktop_config.json

nexus-ai.name: Nexus-AI
nexus-ai.description: AI-augmented business CRM — leads, deals, knowledge base, and pipeline agents
